title: KLA Corp. (KLAC) Beats Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: KLA Corp.'s (KLAC) fiscal Q3 results reflect gains from increased customer demand across each of the major product groups. Also, growing investments in foundry & logic remain a tailwind.

title: KLA Corporation's (KLAC) CEO Rick Wallace on Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: KLA Corporation (NASDAQ:KLAC ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 28, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Kevin Kessel - Vice President, Investor Relations and Market Analytics Rick Wallace - Chief Executive Officer Bren Higgins - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Harlan Sur - JPMorgan CJ Muse - Evercore Timothy Arcuri - UBS Joe Quatrochi - Wells Fargo Patrick Ho - Stifel Vedvati Shrotre - Jefferies Rob Mertens - Cowen Atif Malik - Citi Weston Twigg - Piper Sandler Operator Good afternoon. My name is David, and I will be your conference operator today.

title: KLA (KLAC) Tops Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: KLA (KLAC) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.87% and 3.48%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: KLA Corporation Reports Fiscal 2022 Third Quarter Results
text: Total revenues were $2.29 billion, towards the high-end of the range of guidance; GAAP diluted EPS attributable to KLA was $4.83 and non-GAAP diluted EPS attributable to KLA was $5.13, each above the midpoint of the ranges of guidance; Cash flow from operating activities and free cash flow were $818.9 million and $718.6 million, respectively; and Capital returns were $723.7 million with $159.0 million in dividends paid and $564.7 million in share repurchases. MILPITAS, Calif.

title: KLA Corp. (KLAC) to Report Q3 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: KLA Corp.'s (KLAC) fiscal Q3 results might reflect the gains from strong momentum in core markets and strength in wafer fabrication equipment. Yet, supply chain constraints might have been a concern.

title: KLA Corp.'s (KLAC) Frontline Cloud Services Boost Portfolio
text: KLA Corp. (KLAC) introduces Frontline Cloud Services solution to speed up the process of design-for-manufacturability analysis and minimize IT-related bottlenecks.

title: KLA Moves PCB Design-for-Manufacturability Analysis to the Cloud
text: New Frontline Cloud Services enables up to 90% faster DFM analysis speeds to meet productivity demands MILPITAS, Calif. , April 7, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) today announced the launch of Frontline Cloud Services, a software solution that accelerates design-for-manufacturability (DFM) analysis and time-to-market (TTM) for complex printed circuit boards (PCBs).

title: KLA Announces Third Quarter Fiscal Year 2022 Earnings Date
text: MILPITAS, Calif. , April 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- KLA Corporation (NASDAQ: KLAC) today announced that the company will review third quarter fiscal year 2022 earnings on Thursday, April 28, 2022 at 2 p.m.
